---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new public skill or a boundary change for an existing one
title: '[proposal] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What recurring problem should this skill solve?

## Why this belongs in public repo

Explain why it is reusable, bounded, and portable.

## Proposed boundary

What should this skill do, and what should it explicitly not do?

## Router or Wrench?

Classify it first.
If Router, define the A/B split.
If Wrench, explain why it should stay linear.

## Real validation

What real runs, artifacts, or repeated success support this proposal?
